channel.title: Productivity on Code & AI
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Code & AI

item.title: Context window: when your AI agent starts forgetting
item.description: The context window is the scarcest resource in AI-augmented development. When your policies, protocols, and sessions grow, the agent starts ignoring instructions. Here is how we fixed it.

item.title: Inside Claude Code: 10 interesting things from analyzing its source code
item.description: The Claude Code source was briefly leaked and someone made a public port. We analyzed it in depth. Here are some useful things to get more out of it as a developer.

item.title: AI-Augmented Development: my real experience working with an AI agent
item.description: I have been working with an AI agent as a development collaborator for months. It is not autocomplete. It is another developer on the team. This is what I have learned.
